(** *Formal Power Series *)

(** By Alvaro Pelayo, Vladimir Voevodsky and Michael A. Warren *)

(** January 2011 *)

(** made compatible with the current UniMath library again by Benedikt Ahrens in 2014
    and by Ralph Matthes in 2017 *)

(** Imports *)

Require Import UniMath.PAdics.lemmas.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.RigsAndRings.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


(** ** I. Summation in a commutative ring *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.


R: commring
upper: nat
f: nat → R
R


R: commring
upper: nat
f: nat → R
R

  
R: commring
upper: nat
(nat → R) → R

  
R: commring
(nat → R) → R
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: (nat → R) → R
(nat → R) → R

  
R: commring
(nat → R) → R
 
R: commring
f: nat → R
R
 exact ( f 0%nat ).
  
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: (nat → R) → R
(nat → R) → R
 
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: (nat → R) → R
f: nat → R
R
 exact ( IHupper f + f ( S upper ) ).
Defined.


R: commring
upper: nat
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper f'


R: commring
upper: nat
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper f'

  
R: commring
upper: nat
∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper f'
 
R: commring
∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ 0 → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 0 f = natsummation0 0 f'
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 (S upper) f =
  natsummation0 (S upper) f'

  
R: commring
∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ 0 → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 0 f = natsummation0 0 f'

f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ 0 → f x = f' x
natsummation0 0 f = natsummation0 0 f'

f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ 0 → f x = f' x
f 0%nat = f' 0%nat

f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ 0 → f x = f' x
0 ≤ 0
 apply isreflnatleh.

upper: nat

R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 (S upper) f = natsummation0 (S upper) f'
 
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) =
natsummation0 upper f' + f' (S upper)

IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 upper f' + f (S upper) =
natsummation0 upper f' + f' (S upper)

R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
S upper ≤ S upper

      
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
natsummation0 upper f' + f' (S upper) =
natsummation0 upper f' + f' (S upper)
 apply idpath.

→ natsummation0 upper f =

f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
S upper ≤ S upper
 apply isreflnatleh.

 assumption.
      
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R

p': x ≤ upper
upper ≤ S upper
 
R: commring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f f' : nat → R,
(∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = f' x)
→ natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper f'
f, f': nat → R
p: ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → f x = f' x
x: nat
p': x ≤ upper
upper < S upper
 apply natlthnsn.
Defined.

(* Here we consider summation of functions which are, in a fixed
interval, 0 for all but either the first or last value. *)


R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
p: ∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f = f 0%nat

upper: nat
p: ∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f = f 0%nat

upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f 0%nat
(∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 (S upper) f = f 0%nat

f: nat → R
(∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 0 f = f 0%nat
 auto.

→ natsummation0 upper f = f 0%nat
p: ∏ x : nat, 0 < x → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) = f 0%nat

Defined.

f: nat → R

p: ∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f = f upper

natsummation0 upper f = f upper

f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
(∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 (S upper) f = f (S upper)

f: nat → R
(∏ x : nat, x < 0 → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 0 f = f 0%nat
 auto.
  
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
(∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 (S upper) f = f (S upper)
 
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
natsummation0 (S upper) f = f (S upper)

    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 (S upper) f = f (S upper)

f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
natsummation0 upper f =

R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → f x = 0

      
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
m: nat
q: m ≤ upper
f m = 0

      
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
m: nat
q: m ≤ upper
m < S upper

      exact ( natlehlthtrans m upper ( S upper ) q ( natlthnsn upper ) ).
    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 (S upper) f = f (S upper)

    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) = f (S upper)
 
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) + f (S upper) =
f (S upper)

    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) = 0
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g': natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) = 0
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) + f (S upper) =
f (S upper)

    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) = 0
 
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R
natsummation0 upper g'' = 0

      
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R
∏ x : nat, 0 < x → g'' x = 0
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R
q0: ∏ x : nat, 0 < x → g'' x = 0
natsummation0 upper g'' = 0

      
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R

R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R
k: nat
pp: 0 < k
g'' k = 0
 apply idpath. 
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g'':= λ _ : nat, 0: nat → R
q0: ∏ x : nat, 0 < x → g'' x = 0
natsummation0 upper g'' = 0

      exact ( natsummationae0bottom upper q0 ).
    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g': natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) = 0
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) + f (S upper) =
f (S upper)

    
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)
g': natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0) = 0
0 + f (S upper) = f (S upper)
 
R: commring
f: nat → R
upper: nat
IHupper: (∏ x : nat, x < upper → f x = 0)
→ natsummation0 upper f = f upper
p: ∏ x : nat, x < S upper → f x = 0
g: natsummation0 upper f =
natsummation0 upper (λ _ : nat, 0)

f (S upper) = f (S upper)

Defined.

upper: nat

i ≤ upper
→ natsummation0 (S upper) f =

k: S i = S upper

f (natcoface (S i) (S upper)) + f (S i)

(** The following lemma asserts that
$\sum^{n}_{k=0}\sum^{k}_{l=0}f(l,k-l)=\sum^{n}_{k=0}\sum^{n-k}_{l=0}f(k,l)$
*)


R: commring
upper: nat
f: nat → nat → R
natsummation0 upper
  (λ i : nat,
   natsummation0 i (λ j : nat, f j (i - j)%nat)) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ k : nat,
   natsummation0 (upper - k) (λ l : nat, f k l))

  (λ k : nat,
   natsummation0 (upper - k) (λ l : nat, f k l))

   natsummation0 (upper - k)
     (λ l : nat, f k l))

     (λ l : nat, f k l)) =

natsummation0 upper (λ j : nat, f j (S upper - j)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper (λ k : nat, f k (S (upper - k)))

 natsummation0 0 (λ l : nat, f (S upper) l))

  apply idpath.

(** * II. Reindexing along functions i : nat -> nat which are
automorphisms of the interval of summation.*)

Definition isnattruncauto ( upper : nat ) ( i : nat -> nat ) :=
  ( forall x : nat, natleh x upper ->
    ∑ (y : nat), natleh y upper ×
      ( i y = x  × forall z : nat, natleh z upper -> i z = x -> y = z ) ) ×
  forall x : nat, natleh x upper -> natleh ( i x ) upper.


upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
n, m: nat
n': n ≤ upper
m': m ≤ upper
i n = i m → n = m

Definition nattruncautopreimage { upper : nat } { i : nat -> nat }
  ( p : isnattruncauto upper i ) { n : nat } ( n' : natleh n upper ) : nat :=
  pr1 ( pr1 p n n' ).

Definition nattruncautopreimagepath { upper : nat } { i : nat -> nat }
  ( p : isnattruncauto upper i ) { n : nat } ( n' : natleh n upper ) :
  i ( nattruncautopreimage p n' ) = n := pr1 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( pr1 p n n' ) ) ).

Definition nattruncautopreimageineq { upper : nat } { i : nat -> nat }
  ( p : isnattruncauto upper i ) { n : nat } ( n' : natleh n upper ) :
  natleh ( nattruncautopreimage p n' ) upper :=
  pr1 ( pr2 ( pr1 p n n' ) ).

Definition nattruncautopreimagecanon { upper : nat } { i : nat -> nat }
  ( p : isnattruncauto upper i ) { n : nat } ( n' : natleh n upper )
  { m : nat } ( m' : natleh m upper ) ( q : i m = n ) :
  nattruncautopreimage p n' = m := pr2 ( pr2 ( pr2 ( pr1 p n n' ) ) ) m m' q.

 exact ( nattruncautopreimage p r ).
Defined.


upper: nat

isnattruncauto upper (nattruncautoinv p)

p: isnattruncauto upper i

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
∏ x : nat,
x ≤ upper
→ ∑ y : nat,
  y ≤ upper
  × nattruncautoinv p y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       z ≤ upper → nattruncautoinv p z = x → y = z)

p: isnattruncauto upper i
∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → nattruncautoinv p x ≤ upper

    × (∏ z : nat,

i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
n: nat

y ≤ upper
× nattruncautoinv p y = n
  × (∏ z : nat,
     z ≤ upper → nattruncautoinv p z = n → y = z)

i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
n: nat
n': n ≤ upper
i n ≤ upper
× nattruncautoinv p (i n) = n
  × (∏ z : nat,
     z ≤ upper → nattruncautoinv p z = n → i n = z)

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
n: nat
n': n ≤ upper

× (∏ z : nat,

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
match natlthorgeh (i n) (S upper) with
| inl _ => i n
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (i n) (S upper) h with
    | inl _ => i n
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat n (S upper) with
        | inl _ => i n
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end ≤ upper

aux: i (S upper) ≤ S upper
r''': i (S upper) = S upper
S upper = S upper
 apply idpath.
Defined.

r: m ≤ upper

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n, m: nat
q: n ≤ upper
r: m ≤ upper
s: match natlthorgeh (i n) (S upper) with
| inl _ => i n
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (i n) (S upper) h with
    | inl _ => i n
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat n (S upper) with
        | inl _ => i n
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end =
match natlthorgeh (i m) (S upper) with
| inl _ => i m
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (i m) (S upper) h with
    | inl _ => i m
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat m (S upper) with
        | inl _ => i m
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end
i n = i m

f0: i m = S upper

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n, m: nat
q: n ≤ upper
r: m ≤ upper
a1: i n ≥ S upper
s: match natgehchoice (i n) (S upper) a1 with
| inl _ => i n
| inr _ =>
    match isdeceqnat n (S upper) with
    | inl _ => i n
    | inr _ => i (S upper)
    end
end =
match natlthorgeh (i m) (S upper) with
| inl _ => i m
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (i m) (S upper) h with
    | inl _ => i m
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat m (S upper) with
        | inl _ => i m
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end
i n = i m

match natgehchoice (i m) (S upper) b1 with
| inl _ => i m
| inr _ =>
    match isdeceqnat m (S upper) with
    | inl _ => i m
    | inr _ => i (S upper)
    end
end

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
match
  natlthorgeh (i (nattruncautopreimage p q'))
    (S upper)
with
| inl _ => i (nattruncautopreimage p q')
| inr h =>
    match
      natgehchoice (i (nattruncautopreimage p q'))
        (S upper) h
    with
    | inl _ => i (nattruncautopreimage p q')
    | inr _ =>
        match
          isdeceqnat (nattruncautopreimage p q')
            (S upper)
        with
        | inl _ => i (nattruncautopreimage p q')
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end = n

i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
y: truncnattruncauto p x = n
H:= pr1 p: ∏ x : nat,
x ≤ S upper
→ ∑ y : nat,
  y ≤ S upper
  × i y = x
    × (∏ z : nat, z ≤ S upper → i z = x → y = z)

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
y: truncnattruncauto p x = n
H:= pr1 p: ∏ x : nat,
match x with
| S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
| _ => true
end = true
→ ∑ y : nat,
  match y with
  | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
  | _ => true
  end = true
  × i y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       match z with
       | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
       | _ => true
       end = true → i z = x → y = z)
nattruncautopreimage p q' ≤ S upper

| S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0

end = true
→ ∑ y : nat,
  match y with
  | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
  | _ => true
  end = true
  × i y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       match z with
       | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
       | _ => true
       end = true → i z = x → y = z)
H1:= pr2 p: (λ _ : ∏ x : nat,
       x ≤ S upper
       → ∑ y : nat,
         y ≤ S upper
         × i y = x
           × (∏ z : nat,
              z ≤ S upper → i z = x → y = z),
 ∏ x : nat, x ≤ S upper → i x ≤ S upper) 
  (pr1 p)
nattruncautopreimage p q' ≤ S upper

upper: nat
i: nat → nat

n: nat

q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
y: truncnattruncauto p x = n
H:= pr1 p: ∏ x : nat,
match x with
| S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
| _ => true
end = true
→ ∑ y : nat,
  match y with
  | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
  | _ => true
  end = true
  × i y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       match z with
       | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
       | _ => true
       end = true → i z = x → y = z)
H1:= pr2 p: ∏ x : nat,
match x with
| S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
| _ => true
end = true
→ match i x with
  | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
  | _ => true
  end = true
H2:= H n q': ∑ y : nat,
match y with
| S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
| _ => true
end = true
× i y = n
  × (∏ z : nat,
     match z with
     | S (S m0) => natgtb upper m0
     | _ => true
     end = true → i z = n → y = z)
nattruncautopreimage p q' ≤ S upper

              apply (pr2 H2).
              (* apply ( pr1 p ). *)

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
y: match natlthorgeh (i x) (S upper) with
| inl _ => i x
| inr h =>
    match natgehchoice (i x) (S upper) h with
    | inl _ => i x
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat x (S upper) with
        | inl _ => i x
        | inr _ => i (S upper)
        end
    end
end = n
n = i x

x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
r: i x ≥ S upper
y: match natgehchoice (i x) (S upper) r with
| inl _ => i x
| inr _ =>
    match isdeceqnat x (S upper) with
    | inl _ => i x
    | inr _ => i (S upper)
    end
end = n

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
l: i x < S upper
y: i x = n
n = i x
 
upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
l: i x < S upper
y: i x = n
n = n
 apply idpath.
              
upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
n: nat
q: n ≤ upper
q': n ≤ S upper
i1: nattruncautopreimage p q' != S upper
x: nat
X: x ≤ upper
r: i x ≥ S upper
y: match natgehchoice (i x) (S upper) r with
| inl _ => i x
| inr _ =>
    match isdeceqnat x (S upper) with
    | inl _ => i x
    | inr _ => i (S upper)
    end
end = n
n = i x

r: i x ≥ S upper
l': x = S upper
y: match natgehchoice (i x) (S upper) r with
| inl _ | _ => i x
end = n
n = i x

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → truncnattruncauto p x ≤ upper
 apply truncnattruncautobound.
Defined.

Definition truncnattruncautoinv { upper : nat } { i : nat -> nat }
  ( p : isnattruncauto ( S upper ) i ) : nat -> nat :=
  nattruncautoinv ( truncnattruncautoisauto p ).


upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
bound: 0 <
nattruncautopreimage p
  (isreflnatleh (S upper))
isnattruncauto upper
  (i
   ∘ natcoface
       (nattruncautopreimage p
          (isreflnatleh (S upper))))

p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
v:= nattruncautopreimage p (isreflnatleh (S upper)): nat

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto (S upper) i
v:= nattruncautopreimage p (isreflnatleh (S upper)): nat
bound: 0 < v
(∏ x : nat,
 x ≤ upper
 → ∑ y : nat,
   y ≤ upper
   × (i ∘ natcoface v) y = x
     × (∏ z : nat,
        z ≤ upper → (i ∘ natcoface v) z = x → y = z))
× (∏ x : nat, x ≤ upper → (i ∘ natcoface v) x ≤ upper)

→ ∑ y : nat,
  y ≤ upper
  × (i ∘ natcoface v) y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       z ≤ upper → (i ∘ natcoface v) z = x → y = z)

bound: 0 < v
m: nat
q: m ≤ upper
aaa: m ≤ S upper
m':= nattruncautopreimage p aaa: nat
l: m' < v
i
  match natgtb v m' with
  | true => m'
  | false => S m'
  end = m

m':= nattruncautopreimage p aaa: nat
r: m' ≥ v
j:= nattruncautopreimagepath p aaa: i m' = m
m'':= (m' - 1)%nat: nat
h: 0 < m'
upper < S upper

a2: v ≤ m''
k': 0%nat = m'
1 < S m'

v:= nattruncautopreimage p (isreflnatleh (S upper)): nat
bound: 0 < v
m: nat
q: m ≤ upper
aaa: m ≤ S upper
m':= nattruncautopreimage p aaa: nat
r: m' ≥ v
j:= nattruncautopreimagepath p aaa: i m' = m
m'':= (m' - 1)%nat: nat
a0: m'' ≤ upper
l': m' > v
a2: v ≤ m''
a1: i (natcoface v m'') = m
n: nat
s: n ≤ upper
t: i (natcoface v n) = m
g0: natcoface v n = m'
i (natcoface v m'') = m

upper: nat
i, j: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
p': isnattruncauto upper j
∏ x : nat,
x ≤ upper
→ ∑ y : nat,
  y ≤ upper
  × (i ∘ j) y = x
    × (∏ z : nat, z ≤ upper → (i ∘ j) z = x → y = z)

upper: nat
(∏ x : nat,
 x ≤ upper
 → ∑ y : nat,
   y ≤ upper
   × nattruncreverse upper y = x
     × (∏ z : nat,
        z ≤ upper
        → nattruncreverse upper z = x → y = z))
× (∏ x : nat,
   x ≤ upper → nattruncreverse upper x ≤ upper)

x ≤ upper
→ ∑ y : nat,
  y ≤ upper
  × nattruncreverse upper y = x
    × (∏ z : nat,
       z ≤ upper → nattruncreverse upper z = x → y = z)

  × nattruncreverse upper y = x

        end
    end
with
| inl _ => upper
| inr _ =>
    match
      isdeceqnat upper

        | inl _ => upper
        | inr _ =>
            match isdeceqnat upper n with
            | inl _ => 0%nat
            | inr _ => n
            end
        end
    with
    | inl _ => 0%nat
    | inr _ =>
        match isdeceqnat 0%nat n with
        | inl _ => upper
        | inr _ =>
            match isdeceqnat upper n with
            | inl _ => 0%nat
            | inr _ => n
            end
        end
    end
end = n

Defined.

(* The following lemma says that we may reindex sums along
automorphisms of the interval over which the finite summation is being
taken. *)


R: commring
upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
f: nat → R
natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper (f ∘ i)

upper: nat
i: nat → nat
p: isnattruncauto upper i
f: nat → R
natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper (f ∘ i)

  
R: commring
upper: nat
∏ i : nat → nat,
isnattruncauto upper i
→ ∏ f : nat → R,
  natsummation0 upper f = natsummation0 upper (f ∘ i)

∏ i : nat → nat,
isnattruncauto 0 i
→ ∏ f : nat → R,
  natsummation0 0 f = natsummation0 0 (f ∘ i)

isnattruncauto upper i
→ ∏ f : nat → R,
  natsummation0 upper f =
  natsummation0 upper (f ∘ i)
∏ i : nat → nat,
isnattruncauto (S upper) i
→ ∏ f : nat → R,
  natsummation0 (S upper) f =
  natsummation0 (S upper) (f ∘ i)

(** * III. Formal Power Series *)

Definition seqson ( A : UU ) := nat -> A.


A: hSet
isaset (seqson A)


A: hSet
isaset (seqson A)

  
A: hSet
isaset (seqson A)

  
A: hSet
isaset (nat → A)

  
A: hSet
isofhlevel 2 (nat → A)

  
A: hSet
isofhlevel 2 A

  apply (pr2 A).
Defined.

Definition isasetfps ( R : commring ) : isaset ( seqson R ) :=
  seqsonisaset R.

Definition fps ( R : commring ) : hSet := make_hSet _ ( isasetfps R ).

Definition fpsplus ( R : commring ) : binop ( fps R ) :=
  fun v w n => ( ( v n ) + ( w n ) ).

Definition fpstimes ( R : commring ) : binop ( fps R ) :=
  fun s t n => natsummation0 n ( fun x : nat => s x * t ( sub n x ) ).

(* SOME TESTS OF THE SUMMATION AND FPSTIMES DEFINITIONS: *)


seqson hz


seqson hz

  
n: nat
hz

  
hz
n: nat
IHn: hz
hz

  
hz
 exact 0.
  
n: nat
IHn: hz
hz
 exact ( nattohz ( S n ) ).
Defined.

(* Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( natsummation0 1 test0 ) ). *)


seqson hz


seqson hz

  
n: nat
hz

  
hz
n: nat
IHn: hz
hz

  
hz
 exact ( 1 + 1 ).
  
n: nat
IHn: hz
hz
 exact ( ( 1 + 1 ) * IHn ).
Defined.

(*
Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( fpstimes hz test0 test1 0%nat ) ).

Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( fpstimes hz test0 test1 1%nat ) ).

Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( fpstimes hz test0 test1 2%nat ) ).

Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( fpstimes hz test0 test1 3%nat ) ).

Eval lazy in ( hzabsval ( fpstimes hz test0 test1 4%nat ) ).
*)

Definition fpszero ( R : commring ) : fps R := fun n : nat => 0.


R: commring
fps R


R: commring
fps R

  
R: commring
fps R
 
R: commring
n: nat
R

  
R: commring
R
R: commring
n: nat
R

  
R: commring
R
 exact 1.
  
R: commring
n: nat
R
 exact 0.
Defined.

Definition fpsminus ( R : commring ) : fps R -> fps R :=
  fun s n => - ( s n ).


R: commring
ismonoidop (fpsplus R)


R: commring
ismonoidop (fpsplus R)

  
R: commring
ismonoidop (fpsplus R)

  
R: commring

∏ x x' x'' : fps R,
fpsplus R (fpsplus R x x') x'' =

fpsplus R (fpsplus R s t) u =
fpsplus R s (fpsplus R t u)

      (λ x0 : nat, t x0 * u (n - x - x0)%nat)))

  s x *
  natsummation0 (n - x)

natsummation0 (n - x)
  (λ x0 : nat, t x0 * u (n - x - x0)%nat)

  natsummation0 x

∏ x : nat,
x ≤ n
→ t (n - x)%nat * s x =
  ((λ x0 : nat, t x0 * s (n - x0)%nat)
   ∘ nattruncreverse n) x

a0: natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, s x * t (n - x)%nat) =

m: nat
q: m ≤ n

((λ x : nat, t x * s (n - x)%nat) ∘ nattruncreverse n)

R: commring
s, t: fps R
n: nat
a0: natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, s x * t (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, t (n - x)%nat * s x)
m: nat
q: m ≤ n
t (n - m)%nat * s m =
t (nattruncreverse n m) *
s (n - nattruncreverse n m)%nat

    
R: commring
s, t: fps R
n: nat
a0: natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, s x * t (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, t (n - x)%nat * s x)
m: nat
q: m ≤ n
t (n - m)%nat * s m =
t
  match natgthorleh m n with
  | inl _ => m
  | inr _ => (n - m)%nat
  end *
s
  (n -
   match natgthorleh m n with
   | inl _ => m
   | inr _ => n - m
   end)%nat

s, t: fps R

a0: natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, s x * t (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n (λ x : nat, t (n - x)%nat * s x)
m: nat
q: m ≤ n
h: m > n
t (n - m)%nat * s m = t m * s (n - m)%nat

m: nat
q, h: m ≤ n
t (n - m)%nat * s m =
t (n - m)%nat * s (n - (n - m))%nat

upper: nat

  (λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat,
   t x * s (upper - x)%nat + u x * s (upper - x)%nat)
 
R: commring
s, t, u: fps R
upper: nat
(λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
(λ x : nat,
 t x * s (upper - x)%nat + u x * s (upper - x)%nat)

    
R: commring
s, t, u: fps R
upper: nat
(λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) ~
(λ x : nat,
 t x * s (upper - x)%nat + u x * s (upper - x)%nat)

    
R: commring
s, t, u: fps R
upper, n: nat
(t n + u n) * s (upper - n)%nat =
t n * s (upper - n)%nat + u n * s (upper - n)%nat

    apply R.
  
R: commring
s, t, u: fps R
upper: nat
a0: natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat,
   t x * s (upper - x)%nat +
   u x * s (upper - x)%nat)
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, t x * s (upper - x)%nat) +
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, u x * s (upper - x)%nat)

  
R: commring
s, t, u: fps R
upper: nat
a0: natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat,
   t x * s (upper - x)%nat +
   u x * s (upper - x)%nat)
a1: natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat,
   t x * s (upper - x)%nat +
   u x * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, t x * s (upper - x)%nat) +
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, u x * s (upper - x)%nat)
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, (t x + u x) * s (upper - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, t x * s (upper - x)%nat) +
natsummation0 upper
  (λ x : nat, u x * s (upper - x)%nat)

  exact ( pathscomp0 a0 a1 ).
Defined.

Definition fpsring ( R : commring ) :=
  make_setwith2binop ( make_hSet ( seqson R ) ( isasetfps R ) )
                    ( make_dirprod ( fpsplus R ) ( fpstimes R ) ).


R: commring
iscommring (fpsring R)


R: commring
iscommring (fpsring R)

  
R: commring
iscommringops op1 op2

  
R: commring
isringops op1 op2 × iscomm op2

  
R: commring
isringops op1 op2
R: commring
iscomm op2

  
R: commring
isringops op1 op2
 
R: commring
(isabgrop op1 × ismonoidop op2) × isdistr op1 op2

    
R: commring
isabgrop op1 × ismonoidop op2
R: commring
isdistr op1 op2

    
R: commring
isabgrop op1 × ismonoidop op2
 
R: commring
isabgrop op1
R: commring
ismonoidop op2

      
R: commring
isabgrop op1
 
R: commring
isgrop op1 × iscomm op1

        
R: commring
isgrop op1 × iscomm op1
 
R: commring
isgrop op1
R: commring
iscomm op1

           
R: commring
isgrop op1
 exact ( isgropfpsplus R ).
           
R: commring
iscomm op1
 exact ( iscommfpsplus R ).
      
R: commring
ismonoidop op2
 exact ( ismonoidopfpstimes R ).
    
R: commring
isdistr op1 op2
 
R: commring
isldistr op1 op2 × isrdistr op1 op2

      
R: commring
isldistr op1 op2 × isrdistr op1 op2
 
R: commring
isldistr op1 op2
R: commring
isrdistr op1 op2

        
R: commring
isldistr op1 op2
 
R: commring
∏ x x' x'' : fpsring R,
x'' * (x + x') = x'' * x + x'' * x'

           
R: commring
x, x', x'': fpsring R
x'' * (x + x') = x'' * x + x'' * x'

           apply ( isldistrfps R ).
        
R: commring
isrdistr op1 op2
 
R: commring
∏ x x' x'' : fpsring R,
(x + x') * x'' = x * x'' + x' * x''

           
R: commring
x, x', x'': fpsring R
(x + x') * x'' = x * x'' + x' * x''

           apply ( isrdistrfps R ).
  
R: commring
iscomm op2
 
R: commring
∏ x x' : fpsring R, x * x' = x' * x

    
R: commring
x, x': fpsring R
x * x' = x' * x

    apply ( iscommfpstimes R ).
Defined.

Definition fpscommring ( R : commring ) : commring :=
  make_commring ( fpsring R ) ( fpsiscommring R ).

Definition fpsshift { R : commring } ( a : fpscommring R ) : fpscommring R :=
  fun n : nat => a ( S n ).


R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
∏ n : nat, (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n


R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
∏ n : nat, (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n

  
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
(a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n

  
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
(a * b) 1%nat = (a * fpsshift b) 0%nat
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
(a * b) (S (S n)) = (a * fpsshift b) (S n)

  
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
(a * b) 1%nat = (a * fpsshift b) 0%nat
 
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
fpstimes R a b 1%nat = (a * fpsshift b) 0%nat

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
fpstimes R a b 1%nat = fpstimes R a (fpsshift b) 0%nat

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
natsummation0 1 (λ x : nat, a x * b (1 - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 0
  (λ x : nat, a x * fpsshift b (0 - x)%nat)

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
natsummation0 1 (λ x : nat, a x * b (1 - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 0 (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (0 - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
a 0%nat * b 1%nat + a 1%nat * b 0%nat =
a 0%nat * b 1%nat

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
a 0%nat * b 1%nat + a 1%nat * 0 = a 0%nat * b 1%nat

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
a 0%nat * b 1%nat + 0 = a 0%nat * b 1%nat

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
a 0%nat * b 1%nat = a 0%nat * b 1%nat

    apply idpath.
  
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
(a * b) (S (S n)) = (a * fpsshift b) (S n)
 
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
fpstimes R a b (S (S n)) = (a * fpsshift b) (S n)

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
fpstimes R a b (S (S n)) =
fpstimes R a (fpsshift b) (S n)

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
fpstimes R a b (S (S n)) =
fpstimes R a (λ n : nat, b (S n)) (S n)

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S (S n))
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) +
a (S (S n)) * b (S (S n) - S (S n))%nat =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) +
a (S (S n)) * b 0%nat =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) +
a (S (S n)) * 0 =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) + 0 =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S (S n - x)))

    
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
∏ x : nat,
x ≤ S n
→ a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat = a x * b (S (S n - x))

p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
x: nat

a x * b (S (S n) - x)%nat = a x * b (S (S n - x))

n: nat

x: nat
j: x ≤ S n
b (S (S n) - x)%nat = b (S (S n - x))

n: nat

x: nat

x: nat
j: x ≤ S n
(S (S n) - x)%nat = (S (S n) - x)%nat
R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat
IHn: (a * b) (S n) = (a * fpsshift b) n
x: nat

x < S (S n)

    
R: commring

n: nat

x: nat

(S (S n) - x)%nat = (S (S n) - x)%nat
 apply idpath.

a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat

x: nat

R: commring
a, b: fpscommring R
p: b 0%nat = 0
n: nat

S n < S (S n)
 apply natlthnsn.
Defined.

R: acommring
upper: nat
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 upper f # 0
∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0

upper: nat
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 upper f # 0
∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0

  
R: acommring
upper: nat
∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
 
R: acommring
∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 0 f # 0 → ∃ n : nat, n ≤ 0 × f n # 0
R: acommring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 (S upper) f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ S upper × f n # 0

∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 0 f # 0 → ∃ n : nat, n ≤ 0 × f n # 0
 
R: acommring
∏ f : nat → pr1 R,
f 0%nat # 0
→ ishinh_UU
    (∑ n : nat,
     match n with
     | 0%nat => true
     | S _ => false
     end = true × f n # 0)

    
R: acommring
f: nat → pr1 R
p: f 0%nat # 0
ishinh_UU
  (∑ n : nat,
   match n with
   | 0%nat => true
   | S _ => false
   end = true × f n # 0)

 match n with
 | 0%nat => true
 | S _ => false
 end = true × f n # 0) → P
P

 end = true × f n # 0) → P

 | 0%nat => true

 end = true × f n # 0) → P

R: acommring

upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0

natsummation0 (S upper) f # 0

→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0

upper: nat

natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 (S upper) f # 0
P: hProp
s: (∑ n : nat, n ≤ S upper × f n # 0) → P
P

    
R: acommring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) # 0
P: hProp
s: (∑ n : nat, n ≤ S upper × f n # 0) → P
P

    
R: acommring
upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) # 0

(natsummation0 upper f # 0) ⨿ (f (S upper) # 0) → P

upper: nat
IHupper: ∏ f : nat → R,
natsummation0 upper f # 0
→ ∃ n : nat, n ≤ upper × f n # 0
f: nat → R
p: natsummation0 upper f + f (S upper) # 0

Definition fpsapart0 ( R : acommring ) : hrel ( fpscommring R ) :=
  fun s t : fpscommring R => ∃ n : nat, s n # t n.

R: acommring
∑ R0 : apart (fpscommring R),
isbinopapart R0 op1 × isbinopapart R0 op2

  
R: acommring
isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op1
× isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op2

  
R: acommring
isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op1
R: acommring
isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op2

  
R: acommring
isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op1
 
R: acommring
isbinopapartl (fpsapart R) op1
R: acommring
isbinopapartr (fpsapart R) op1

    
R: acommring
isbinopapartl (fpsapart R) op1
 apply ( fpsapartisbinopapartplusl R).
    
R: acommring
isbinopapartr (fpsapart R) op1
 apply ( fpsapartisbinopapartplusr R ).
  
R: acommring
isbinopapart (fpsapart R) op2
 
R: acommring
isbinopapartl (fpsapart R) op2
R: acommring
isbinopapartr (fpsapart R) op2

    
R: acommring
isbinopapartl (fpsapart R) op2
 apply ( fpsapartisbinopapartmultl R ).
    
R: acommring
isbinopapartr (fpsapart R) op2
 apply ( fpsapartisbinopapartmultr R ).
Defined.

Definition isacommringapartdec ( R : acommring ) :=
  isapartdec ( pr1 ( pr2 R ) ).


R: aintdom
a: fpscommring R
is: isacommringapartdec R
p: a 0%nat # 0
∏ (n : nat) (b : fpscommring R), b n # 0 → a * b # 0
